title: Impardiac
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''Impardiac''''' was a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] in which [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] were sent to [[Cybloc XII/Legends|Cybloc XII]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Planet of Twilight]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
